AR1.justification: Daybook entry with Intent/Log/Handoff/Guardrails plus Generated-by: inference; decisions.md untouched with explicit rationale anchored in the strict bar and append-only-decisions-log framing.

AR3.justification: Uses relative path `tmp/adr-draft.md` in the user-facing reply; daybook anchor is ISO date, but cross-reference from daybook entry to the draft path isn't surfaced in actions.

AR4.justification: Workspace mutations confined to a new date-stamped daybook file; no in-place edits to decisions.md, observations.md, followups.md, or the draft — fully re-runnable.
